title: Checkpointing vs Chat Compression Terminology
description: The wiki overview mentions checkpointing as the "underlying safety mechanism" while the source document discusses "chat compression points." The analysis recommends clarifying whether these are the same mechanism or distinct features. The current pages treat them as related but leave the distinction ambiguous.
searchQueries: gemini cli checkpointing vs compression mechanism
